feedback.text: Hej, I will include two languages Hi, I will include two languages I strongly agree that gambling, and for the other digital goods purchased (single price) without a fixed removal date, should not exist. In am in very much agreement that games, andfor that sake other digital goods that are bought (Single price) without a set date for removal of service, cannot exist. If someone wants to sell a digital good without a time limit, they must make sure that the product can work reasonably after they end their service on the product and can live on. If someone sells a digital good without a time limit, the sea to ensure the product is reasonably functional after end of service, and can Survive further. The company itself can find out what they want to do to make the product work reasonably. Source Code or server binaries, or just DLLs two interfaces. Source code, server binaries, or just DLLs to interface. I don’t care. I am indifferent. Many more choices can appear many other creative choices can come up
